incident_transitions_actor_consistent.name: incident_transitions_actor_consistent
incident_transitions_actor_consistent.value: ("incident_transitions"."actor_type" = 'user' AND "incident_transitions"."actor_user_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("incident_transitions"."actor_type" <> 'user' AND "incident_transitions"."actor_user_id" IS NULL)

incidents_public_title_length.name: incidents_public_title_length
incidents_public_title_length.value: "incidents"."public_title" IS NULL OR length(trim("incidents"."public_title")) BETWEEN 1 AND 240

incidents_terminal_fields_consistent.name: incidents_terminal_fields_consistent
incidents_terminal_fields_consistent.value:
(
        "incidents"."lifecycle" IN ('resolved', 'postmortem_published')
        AND "incidents"."resolved_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "incidents"."outcome" IS NOT NULL
      ) OR (
        "incidents"."lifecycle" NOT IN ('resolved', 'postmortem_published')
        AND "incidents"."resolved_at" IS NULL
        AND ("incidents"."outcome" IS NULL OR "incidents"."outcome" = 'maintenance_related')
      )

incidents_canonical_relationship_consist.name: incidents_canonical_relationship_consistent

expected_check_windows_claim_consistent.name: expected_check_windows_claim_consistent
expected_check_windows_claim_consistent.value: "expected_check_windows"."status" <> 'claimed' OR ("expected_check_windows"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "expected_check_windows"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "expected_check_windows"."claimed_at" IS NOT NULL)

monitors_pause_state_consistent.name: monitors_pause_state_consistent
monitors_pause_state_consistent.value: ("monitors"."status" = 'paused' AND "monitors"."paused_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("monitors"."status" <> 'paused' AND "monitors"."paused_at" IS NULL)

service_state_overrides_cancellation_con.name: service_state_overrides_cancellation_consistent
service_state_overrides_cancellation_con.value: ("service_state_overrides"."cancelled_at" IS NULL AND "service_state_overrides"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NULL) OR ("service_state_overrides"."cancelled_at" IS NOT NULL AND "service_state_overrides"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL)

service_state_transitions_actor_consiste.name: service_state_transitions_actor_consistent
service_state_transitions_actor_consiste.value: ("service_state_transitions"."actor_type" = 'user' AND "service_state_transitions"."actor_user_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("service_state_transitions"."actor_type" IN ('worker','system') AND "service_state_transitions"."actor_user_id" IS NULL)

notification_deliveries_destination_cons.name: notification_deliveries_destination_consistent
notification_deliveries_destination_cons.value:
(
        "notification_deliveries"."channel" = 'email'
        AND "notification_deliveries"."subscriber_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "notification_deliveries"."webhook_destination_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "notification_deliveries"."channel" = 'webhook'
        AND "notification_deliveries"."webhook_destination_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "notification_deliveries"."subscriber_id" IS NULL
      )

notification_deliveries_source_consisten.name: notification_deliveries_source_consistent
notification_deliveries_source_consisten.value:
("notification_deliveries"."kind" = 'incident_update' AND "notification_deliveries"."incident_public_update_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("notification_deliveries"."kind" <> 'incident_update' AND "notification_deliveries"."incident_public_update_id" IS NULL)

notification_deliveries_completion_consi.name: notification_deliveries_completion_consistent
notification_deliveries_completion_consi.value: "notification_deliveries"."status" NOT IN ('succeeded', 'permanently_failed', 'suppressed') OR "notification_deliveries"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL

notification_deliveries_lease_consistent.name: notification_deliveries_lease_consistent
notification_deliveries_lease_consistent.value: "notification_deliveries"."status" <> 'sending' OR ("notification_deliveries"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "notification_deliveries"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

outbox_events_claim_consistent.name: outbox_events_claim_consistent
outbox_events_claim_consistent.value: "outbox_events"."status" <> 'claimed' OR ("outbox_events"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "outbox_events"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

subscriber_verification_tokens_single_te.name: subscriber_verification_tokens_single_terminal_state
subscriber_verification_tokens_single_te.value: NOT ("subscriber_verification_tokens"."used_at" IS NOT NULL AND "subscriber_verification_tokens"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL)

subscribers_state_timestamps_consistent.name: subscribers_state_timestamps_consistent
subscribers_state_timestamps_consistent.value:
(
        "subscribers"."state" = 'pending_verification'
        AND "subscribers"."verified_at" IS NULL
        AND "subscribers"."unsubscribed_at" IS NULL
        AND "subscribers"."suppressed_at" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "subscribers"."state" = 'active'
        AND "subscribers"."verified_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "subscribers"."unsubscribed_at" IS NULL
        AND "subscribers"."suppressed_at" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "subscribers"."state" = 'unsubscribed'
        AND "subscribers"."unsubscribed_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "subscribers"."suppressed_at" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "subscribers"."state" = 'suppressed'
        AND "subscribers"."suppressed_at" IS NOT NULL
      )

api_keys_revocation_consistent.name: api_keys_revocation_consistent
api_keys_revocation_consistent.value:
("api_keys"."revoked_at" IS NULL AND "api_keys"."revoked_by_user_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("api_keys"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL AND "api_keys"."revoked_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL)

audit_events_actor_consistent.name: audit_events_actor_consistent
audit_events_actor_consistent.value:
("audit_events"."actor_type" = 'user' AND "audit_events"."actor_user_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("audit_events"."actor_type" <> 'user' AND "audit_events"."actor_user_id" IS NULL)

daily_availability_aggregates_latency_no.name: daily_availability_aggregates_latency_nonnegative
daily_availability_aggregates_latency_no.value:
("daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p50_milliseconds" IS NULL OR "daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p50_milliseconds" >= 0)
        AND ("daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p95_milliseconds" IS NULL OR "daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p95_milliseconds" >= 0)

daily_availability_aggregates_latency_or.name: daily_availability_aggregates_latency_order
daily_availability_aggregates_latency_or.value:
"daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p50_milliseconds" IS NULL
        OR "daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p95_milliseconds" IS NULL
        OR "daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p95_milliseconds" >= "daily_availability_aggregates"."latency_p50_milliseconds"

maintenance_windows_cancellation_consist.name: maintenance_windows_cancellation_consistent
maintenance_windows_cancellation_consist.value:
(
        "maintenance_windows"."status" = 'scheduled'
        AND "maintenance_windows"."cancelled_at" IS NULL
        AND "maintenance_windows"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "maintenance_windows"."status" = 'cancelled'
        AND "maintenance_windows"."cancelled_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "maintenance_windows"."cancelled_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL
      )

postmortems_publication_consistent.name: postmortems_publication_consistent
postmortems_publication_consistent.value:
(
        "postmortems"."status" = 'draft'
        AND "postmortems"."published_at" IS NULL
        AND "postmortems"."published_by_user_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "postmortems"."status" = 'published'
        AND "postmortems"."published_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."published_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."summary" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."impact" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."timeline" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."root_cause" IS NOT NULL
        AND "postmortems"."resolution" IS NOT NULL
        AND length(trim("postmortems"."summary")) > 0
        AND length(trim("postmortems"."impact")) > 0
        AND length(trim("postmortems"."timeline")) > 0
        AND length(trim("postmortems"."root_cause")) > 0
        AND length(trim("postmortems"."resolution")) > 0
      )

retention_cleanup_runs_completion_consis.name: retention_cleanup_runs_completion_consistent
retention_cleanup_runs_completion_consis.value:
("retention_cleanup_runs"."status" = 'running' AND "retention_cleanup_runs"."completed_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("retention_cleanup_runs"."status" IN ('succeeded', 'failed') AND "retention_cleanup_runs"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL)

organization_invitations_single_terminal.name: organization_invitations_single_terminal_state
organization_invitations_single_terminal.value: NOT ("organization_invitations"."accepted_at" IS NOT NULL AND "organization_invitations"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL)
